description: Shared fragment for inline code handling fields

inlineCodes.title: Inline Codes
inlineCodes.description: Pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, variables, tags) within translatable text.

useCodeFinder.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
useCodeFinder.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, tags, etc.)

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns to identify inline codes in translatable text

mergeAdjacentCodes.title: Merge Adjacent Codes
mergeAdjacentCodes.description: Merge consecutive inline codes into a single placeholder

moveLeadingAndTrailingCodesToSkeleton.title: Move Boundary Codes
moveLeadingAndTrailingCodesToSkeleton.description: Move inline codes at segment boundaries to the skeleton (non-translatable)

simplifierRules.title: Simplifier Rules
simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation
